reviews.review_title: Unable to create an account to use
reviews.review_description: Looks like this requires a medical account to use.  No mention on the app description that a medical account is needed, nor nothing mention of this Quest VR app on their website.

This game is exactly what I was looking for to continue vision therapy at home. I left in-office therapy, and needed a way to continue working on vergence, pursuits, peripheral vision training, suppression and more. I’m having so much fun, and after only a couple of days, I’m finally being nudged into real world convergence.
